notes: Example future risk rules file. v0.1.0 has rules implemented in code. JSON-driven rule loading is planned.

rules.title: Stale enabled user accounts found
rules.recommendation: Perform an access review and disable or remove accounts that are no longer required.

rules.title: Low disk space detected
rules.recommendation: Clean up storage, remove old data, expand the disk, and add monitoring/alerting.

rules.title: Telnet detected
rules.recommendation: Disable Telnet and use SSH/HTTPS management where supported.
